name: Convert DB PSV to M3 View

content.query:
-- This is auto-generated code
CREATE VIEW M3_MITBAL_CV AS

SELECT
    *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/DBJSON/MITBAL_202301160925.csv',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        FIELDTERMINATOR ='0x7c',
        HEADER_ROW=TRUE,
        PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
    ) AS [result]

properties.description: Convert DB Pipe Separated Files to M3 View
